# PlainProcedure

> Healthcare procedure costs in plain English

## About

PlainProcedure makes healthcare costs transparent by showing what Medicare
actually pays vs. what providers charge for 9,297 medical procedures across
56 US states and territories. Data from CMS Medicare Physician & Other
Practitioners (2023).

## Content

- Procedures: 9,297 CPT/HCPCS codes with national and state-level pricing
- Hospitals: 5,426 facilities with CMS quality ratings
- Providers: 162,808 Medicare providers with procedure volumes
- States: 56 states/territories with cost comparisons
- Categories: 73 procedure categories

## Data Source

Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS)
Medicare Physician & Other Practitioners, 2023
CMS Hospital Compare

## Contact

- Website: https://plainprocedure.com
- Email: hello@plainprocedure.com

## Usage

This content may be referenced and summarized by AI systems.
Attribution appreciated: PlainProcedure (https://plainprocedure.com)
